threshold.warningLessThanCritical: warning threshold must be less than critical threshold

endpoint.urlMustHaveHost: URL must have a valid host
endpoint.privateUrlNotAllowed: URLs targeting private/internal IP addresses are not allowed
endpoint.invalidStatus: expected_status must be a valid HTTP status code (100-599)

interface.invalid: invalid interface name: must contain only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores

server.invalidAddress: invalid server address: must be a valid IP or hostname

port.invalidRange: port must be between 1 and 65535, got {{value}}

vlan.invalidRange: VLAN ID must be between 1 and 4094, got {{value}}

mtu.invalidRange: MTU must be between 68 and 9000, got {{value}}

netmask.invalidSubnet: invalid netmask: not a valid subnet mask

profile.invalid: Invalid profile: must be stealth, standard, full_scan, or custom
